hook.name: SuperDCAGauge
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for SuperDCA token pools implementing a three-tier dynamic fee structure (0% internal, 0.10% keeper, 0.50% external), a king-of-the-hill keeper deposit mechanism, and SuperDCA token reward distribution via minting and pool donations triggered on liquidity operations. Only verified router addresses are permitted to execute swaps.
